title: Café Ride with Purpose
description: Social endurance ride with structured blocks

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This feels like nothing. That's the point. Patience builds power, not suffering.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training your body to burn fat efficiently.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Consistency over intensity. Show up, do the work, repeat.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/3. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 2. Your legs have opinions. Noted.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2. Boring? Maybe. Effective? Absolutely. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 2: where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Endurance pace: where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay patient. Stay easy. Trust the process.
